title: Estrogen Receptor, Progesterone Receptor Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
involved in normal cell growth. It also helps certain types of cancer cells grow quickly. Â Cancers with large amounts of HER2 protein tend to grow quickly and spread to other parts of the body. Breast cancer cells with higher-than-normal levels of HER2 are called HER2-positive. Certain medicines, called HER2 targeted therapy, can block or slow HER2 proteins and help control these cancers. But these medicines wonât help cancers that donât have high levels of HER2 proteins. So, HER2 tumor marker testing is necessary to find out if targeted therapy will be helpful.
